content_images.description: Every page must use content images

inquiry_cta.check: grep_all 'data-modal-open|Request a Quote|Get Quote|Submit Inquiry|Contact Our Engineers' | wc -l

faq_interaction.description: FAQ open class must exist in CSS

modal_interaction.description: Modal open class must exist in CSS

nav_button_spec.description: Nav buttons must not mix btn-primary and nav-cta

image_ref_integrity.check: cross-check image-manifest.json status=ok against HTML img src + CSS url()
image_ref_integrity.description: All generated images must be referenced

no_people.check: grep_all 'people|person|face|hands|silhouette|operator|worker' in image prompts and alt text

content_image_ratio.description: At least 60% of images must be content images (not decor icons)
